steps.expected: apps job has 'prisma generate' and 'prisma db push' steps before 'test'
steps.observed: apps job contains steps 'Generate Prisma client' and 'Push Prisma schema to database' before 'Test'

evidence.fileContent:
.github/workflows/ci.yml contains steps:
      - name: Generate Prisma client
        run: pnpm --filter @galileo/api prisma generate

      - name: Push Prisma schema to database
        run: pnpm --filter @galileo/api prisma db push --skip-generate

      - name: Test
        run: pnpm test

steps.expected: test task has inputs array with source/config patterns

summary: Tested 2 code inspection assertions: 2 passed (VAL-SEC-010 and VAL-SEC-011 are properly configured).
